# Manager / Internal Tool Lane

Use for manager brief, shift handoff, order sheet, prep checklist, training hub, event board, staff operations, and internal dashboards.

Pass example: "Create a GM shift brief where the first screen shows today, priority alerts, next action, and clear staff ownership."

Fail example: "Use a customer-facing restaurant hero and bury the operating action below marketing copy."

Required evidence: daily workflow proof, mobile screenshot, primary action proof, realistic operating data, interaction proof when applicable.

Forbidden by default: vague motivational copy, too many equal-priority panels, hidden primary action, large setup forms as the first screen, fake live integrations.
